notes: ESR agreed $3.45M discount from original price. $6M escrow for facade/membrane work (est. $3M cost; remainder returns to ESR, timeline ~6 months with Reg). $55.8M equity raise at 15% IRR, no distributions years 1-2. 30 business day raise, settlement target end of May 2026. Investor pipeline: Picture Partners (up to $5M), Escala ($1-2M), Scala, Intra Link ($2-4M). Platform participation (Net Wealth, Hub24) excluded due to timeline. Retail podium ~10% return, office 17-18%, blended 15%. Stuart/Moods: 10-year extension, full floor, non-contingent.

56,000 sqm industrial site at ~$750/sqm entry (target $1,000+/sqm exit via year-3 subdivision). Three warehouses + 9,000-12,000 sqm hardstand ($45/sqm). Large shed $150/sqm, smaller buildings $120-135/sqm. Australia Post 3yr lease + two 6-month options; 12 months downtime assumed post-exit. Alternative: demolish and sell cleared land ($125/sqm demolition cost, ~$2M). Comparable: Ottawa site $896/sqm, 6.3% market yield, 5.5% initial yield. Cormac Road $1,000+/sqm for smaller lots. Subdivision into smaller parcels expands buyer pool to owner-occupiers.

Built 2000, practical completion 2021. Limited CapEx. Secure 6-year lease with government anchor (33% of building, expires 2033 — zero downtime assumed). Target bid $260-270M; base case $250M known insufficient. 12% IRR, 7% distributions over 7-year hold. Exit $400M at 6% cap rate vs $13,000/sqm replacement cost. Fee structure: 65 bips (down from 80 bips) more defensible for passive asset management. Two groups competing (likely inc. Letterer Capital). Walker building completion pushed 2029-2030, limiting alternative accommodation. David Krasnostein and Michelle site visit scheduled. Market rent $867/sqm avg; 3.5-3.6% renewal growth; CBD vacancy improving from 6%.
